chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-271 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIOIRTY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.1144/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 24.10.2024. Mr. Sarmad Ali, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ________________ Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, Petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
